understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to guide the player to the goal gem '+' by carefully navigating the tile grid, avoiding hazards (like spikes), and using clicks to remove obstacles when necessary. Success depended on efficient use of limited moves per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was restricted to left or right; after each horizontal move, gravity pulled the player continuously until landing or hitting a hazard or the goal. Clicks removed breakable blocks, which could allow access to new routes. Undo reverted the last action to recover from mistakes. Hazards like spikes would end the attempt immediately upon landing. Passage columns provided the only way to progress up or down to a different section.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to guide the player to the goal gem '+' by carefully navigating the tile grid, avoiding hazards (like spikes), and using clicks to remove obstacles when necessary. Success depended on efficient use of limited moves per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was restricted to left or right; after each horizontal move, gravity pulled the player continuously until landing or hitting a hazard or the goal. Clicks removed breakable blocks, which could allow access to new routes. Undo reverted the last action to recover from mistakes. Hazards like spikes would end the attempt immediately upon landing. Passage columns provided the only way to progress up or down to a different section.
